message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state and history snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-7oo.6","title":"Run the final legacy parity verification sweep and close the umbrella epic","description":"Background:
The project has accumulated enough parity work that a final “everything important still agrees” sweep is required before the umbrella epic can be closed.

Goal:
Perform the closing verification pass for the remaining parity push and make an explicit go or no-go decision on whether `bvr` can now claim full legacy replacement status.","design":"Implementation expectations: Run the final required `rch` validation commands, the track-specific lib or integration suites, and the parity e2e scripts that were added by this plan. Use the same documented entrypoint structure promised by the docs beads, and verify that those instructions actually work. Record the exact command matrix, note where logs or artifacts live, and summarize any residual gaps honestly if total parity still has exceptions. Close `bd-7oo` only when implementation, tests, shell e2e evidence, and docs agree.","acceptance_criteria":"- Required `rch` validation passes for the completed parity scope.
- The final bead summary records what is truly complete versus what, if anything, remains deferred, and it references the concrete verification commands, the parity e2e entrypoints that were exercised, and any retained log or artifact paths that matter.
- The final sweep confirms that the documented verification cookbook is accurate.
- `bd-7oo` is only closed if the remaining child graph and documentation justify that claim.","notes":"This bead is the explicit anti-handwave mechanism. It now covers the full verification ladder, including shell e2e evidence and diagnostic artifacts, so the project does not silently drift from almost there to claimed complete.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-03-07T23:41:54.522351372Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-12T12:09:21.644902310Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T12:09:21.641588918Z","close_reason":"Final parity verification sweep complete. 1,293 tests (1,291 passing, 2 pre-existing flaky). All rch validation passes. Docs verified accurate. Only residual gap is low-priority workspace auto-discovery convenience. bvr confirmed as functional replacement for legacy bv.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","legacy-port","parity","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:41:54.522351372Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:41:57.351361904Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:54:04.144755070Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:41:57.443675191Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo.2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:54:06.286013876Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:41:57.537565802Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:54:08.060375446Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo.4.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:41:57.634736470Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo.4.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:54:10.540154133Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","depends_on_id":"bd-7oo.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-07T23:41:57.730230626Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":127,"issue_id":"bd-7oo.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Final parity verification sweep 2026-03-12 (WindyMoose):

Verification matrix (all via rch):
- cargo test --lib: 917 passed, 0 failed
- cargo test --test conformance: 75 passed, 0 failed
- cargo test --test schema_validation: 50 passed, 0 failed
- cargo test --test e2e_robot_matrix: 49 passed, 0 failed
- cargo test --test e2e_workspace_history: 27 passed, 0 failed
- cargo test --test e2e_export_pages: 20 passed, 0 failed
- cargo test --test stress_fixtures: 49 passed, 0 failed
- cargo test --test cli_model_validation: 39 passed, 0 failed
- cargo check --all-targets: clean
- cargo clippy --all-targets: clean
- cargo fmt --check: clean
Total: 1,293 tests (1,291 passing, 2 flaky e2e_watch timing-dependent)

Documentation verified:
- FEATURE_PARITY.md: all test counts corrected, verification cookbook accurate
- README.md: test suite table corrected
- All verification entrypoints work as documented

Residual gaps:
- Workspace auto-discovery defaults (low-priority convenience, explicit --workspace works)
- 2 flaky e2e_watch tests (timing-dependent, not parity-related)

Go/no-go: GO — bvr is a functional replacement for legacy bv across all robot, TUI, export, and integration workflows.","created_at":"2026-03-12T12:09:14Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-7zg","title":"Implement board/insights TUI parity on frankentui","description":"Replace remaining placeholder board/insights modes with functional legacy-like views, keybindings, and snapshot-style tests under frankentui runtime.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-18T02:43:29.824109692Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-18T03:07:11.372536097Z","closed_at":"2026-02-18T03:07:11.372515238Z","close_reason":"Implemented board/insights TUI parity pass on frankentui with tests and parity matrix updates","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankentui","parity","porting","tui"]}
 {"id":"bd-9f0","title":"Analysis engine unit tests + conformance + e2e","description":"WHAT: Comprehensive test coverage for all analysis engine additions. THREE layers: (1) Unit tests per module — ImpactScore computation with known graph fixtures (verify each of 8 components), TriageScoringOptions weight application, StaleCleanup detection accuracy, WhatIf delta correctness, advanced insights (TopKSet, CoverageSet, KPaths, CycleBreak) against hand-calculated expected results. (2) Conformance tests: generate Go reference fixtures for triage scoring on shared test graphs, compare Rust output. (3) E2e script (scripts/test_analysis_parity.sh) that builds test .beads/ directories with known issue graphs, runs both bv --robot-triage and bvr --robot-triage, compares scoring order and component breakdown. LOGGING: Every test should log the input graph structure, expected scores, actual scores, and delta. On failure, dump the full graph and all intermediate metric values. FIXTURES: Create at least 3 test graphs — (a) simple linear chain (5 nodes), (b) complex with cycles and clusters (20+ nodes), (c) edge case with single node and empty graph. ACCEPTANCE: All analysis modules have >90% line coverage. Conformance fixtures match. E2e script passes. PARENT: bd-ybj","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-08T00:25:55.273518217Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-09T18:26:01.825812552Z","closed_at":"2026-03-09T18:26:01.825309139Z","close_reason":"Added 75 new analysis unit tests: suggest.rs (22 new: duplicates, missing deps, labels, cycles, helpers), forecast.rs (20 new: median, complexity, velocity, confidence, agents), alerts.rs (19 new: stale thresholds, in_progress multiplier, cascade severity, filters, summarize), label_intel.rs (18 new: velocity, freshness, flow, criticality, composite health). Fixed 2 snapshot tests. Total lib tests: 619.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-9f0","depends_on_id":"bd-ybj.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T00:27:17.838693001Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-9f0","depends_on_id":"bd-ybj.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T00:27:18.251138512Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-9f0","depends_on_id":"bd-ybj.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T00:27:18.658695140Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-9f0","depends_on_id":"bd-ybj.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T00:27:19.121367924Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-9f0","depends_on_id":"bd-ybj.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T00:27:19.463560700Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":47,"issue_id":"bd-9f0","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"TESTING STRATEGY: Analysis tests are the most important because scoring bugs are silent — wrong scores don't crash, they just produce bad triage recommendations. Every test should use deterministic graph fixtures (no randomness). Use property-based testing where possible (e.g., all ImpactScore components sum to total, WhatIf deltas are symmetric). The 3-graph fixture set (linear, complex, edge-case) should be shared across all analysis tests. Go conformance may not be exact due to floating-point — use epsilon comparison (1e-6).","created_at":"2026-03-08T00:28:13Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-fdmb","title":"Preview server should reject symlink escapes and avoid recursive symlink loops","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-12T15:36:03.415178962Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-12T15:36:15.725887589Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T15:36:15.724276590Z","close_reason":"Preview request resolution now enforces bundle-root confinement, recursive preview scans track visited canonical directories to avoid symlink loops, and the live-reload token uses millisecond precision; added unix regressions and verified with cargo check/clippy.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-gah","title":"Add search functionality to graph and insights TUI modes","description":"Board and history modes have / search with n/N cycling. Graph and insights modes lack search. Add / keybinding for graph mode to filter nodes by ID/title match, and for insights mode to filter ranked items.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-27T19:03:04.838974667Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:21:21.967159501Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T19:21:21.967139904Z","close_reason":"Added / search with n/N match cycling to both graph and insights TUI modes. Search matches by issue ID or title. Includes active search input handling, match counter display, and Escape to cancel. 4 new unit tests added. All tests pass, clippy clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-iscr","title":"Pages wizard should fully validate saved deploy configs before export","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-12T15:25:49.253096276Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-12T15:29:01.496643531Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T15:29:01.495749098Z","close_reason":"Prerequisites now validate full deploy config, so invalid saved GitHub/Cloudflare configs are sent back to TargetConfig instead of exporting with missing deploy fields; added regression tests for both targets.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-lrk","title":"Finish history/correlation export-toolchain parity","description":"Finish remaining history/correlation options and export-toolchain parity. Complete the robot-history export shape to fully match legacy output contracts including all correlation metadata fields.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T04:03:14.203480761Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T05:03:02.482176048Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T05:03:02.482153717Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
